[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 001011011 5
2 011100000 3
3 110100110 5
4 000000000 a
5 101111111 8
6 000100011 3
7 110110101 6
